parameters.name: nwb_paths
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of S3 paths to NWB files to evaluate. By default, will include all NWB files found in the attached assets.
parameters.help_text: Comma-separated list of S3 paths to NWB files to evaluate. By default, will include all NWB files found in the attached assets.

parameters.name: sample_n_files
parameters.description: If set, randomly sample this many NWB files from the discovered paths. If None or greater than the number of available files, all files are used.
parameters.help_text: If set, randomly sample this many NWB files from the discovered paths. If None or greater than the number of available files, all files are used.
